title: Slope Game
description: Keep your ball rolling on the neon platform course without falling off the edge.

title: 2048 Classic
description: Slide matching tiles to double their value and strive for the elusive 2048 block.

title: Retro Bowl
description: Manage your roster and run offenses in this beautifully stylized retro pixel football game.

title: Flappy Bird
description: Tap or click carefully to flap your wings and clear dangerous green pipes.

title: Pac-Man Retro
description: Navigate classical retro mazes, chomp pills, and avoid four color-coordinated ghosts.

title: Tunnel Extreme
description: Dodge high-speed spinning barriers as you navigate through infinite futuristic tunnels.

title: Chess Mobile
description: Practice grandmaster chess strategy in real-time matches against clean computer AI.

title: Bubble Shooter
description: Match and pop vibrant rows of colored bubbles before they slide past the lower boundary.

title: Crossy Road
description: Navigate busy traffic, wild train tracks, and flowing rivers in this pixel mascot classic.

title: Solitaire
description: Sort the deck of cards by suit and value in this classic relaxed brain puzzle.

title: Doodle Jump
description: Guide the four-legged alien upper-bound by leaping on dynamic platforms.

title: School Chat Portal
description: Masquerading school messenger frame designed to coordinate gameplay servers.

title: Youtube Stealth Player
description: A stealth embedded educational player. Paste your own educational links.

title: Sneaky Proxy Frame
description: Search index proxy tool designed to look like a standard library portal.

title: Sim Life Simulator
description: Settle choices on complete life paths from childhood to retirement with humorous outcomes.

title: Sandbox Island Craft
description: Harvest, build, and craft blocks across a massive randomly generated island paradise.
